mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, password, name, phone, type_id, rank_id, unit_name, unit_code, enlist_date, discharge_date, login_provider, status, withdrawn_at, created_date, created_nm, modified_date, modified_nm, del_yn FROM `user` WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND del_yn = 'N'
SELECT id, user_id FROM `user` WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND del_yn = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `user` (user_id, password, name, phone, type_id, rank_id, unit_name, unit_code, enlist_date, discharge_date, login_provider, status, created_date, created_nm, del_yn) VALUES (#{userId}, #{password}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{typeId}, #{rankId}, #{unitName}, #{unitCode}, #{enlistDate}, #{dischargeDate}, #{loginProvider}, #{status}, NOW(), #{userId}, 'N')
